summary: P0 BUG FIX VERIFIED: POS Screen selling_price fix is working. All 8 backend tests passed. UI tests confirmed: product search shows Rp 65,000 (not Rp 0), cart displays correct price, qty change updates subtotal correctly (2 x 65,000 = 130,000), payment modal shows correct total.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix is correct: Line 148 uses 'product.selling_price || product.sell_price || 0' to handle both field names
Warning toast correctly displays if product has no valid price (price <= 0)
seed_data_creation: Created test invoice during backend tests using PRD002 (XL Unlimited 30 Hari) with correct price 65,000
context_for_next_testing_agent: POS selling_price bug is FIXED. Product PRD002 has selling_price=65000 and displays correctly in POS. The fix was mapping 'selling_price || sell_price' in addToCart function.

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: POS Screen items showing Rp 0 price instead of actual selling_price
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Field name mismatch - backend sends 'selling_price' but frontend was looking for 'sell_price'
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: POSScreen.jsx line 148: const itemPrice = product.selling_price || product.sell_price || 0

verification_results.product_search_shows_correct_price: PASS - PRD002 shows Rp 65,000 in dropdown
verification_results.adding_item_to_cart_uses_selling_price: PASS - Cart item price is Rp 65,000

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/pos_screen_loaded.png - POS screen with product in cart showing Rp 65,000
.screenshots/pos_cart_with_item.png - Cart with XL Unlimited 30 Hari at correct price
